summary: Handles core, application-level state and UI logic like navigation, toasts, user identity management, and the universal identity registry.

actions.summary: Changes the main view displayed in the UI.
Changes the main view to whatever is configured as the default view.
Updates the application state with the new window dimensions, typically after a user resize.
Displays a short-lived message at the bottom of the screen.
Immediately hides the currently displayed toast message.
Requests that the application's logs folder be opened in the native file explorer.
Copies the provided text to the system clipboard.
Adds a new user identity to the application.
Removes an existing user identity.
Sets the specified user identity as the active one for the application.
Requests the Core feature to display a generic, modal confirmation dialog.

requestId.description: A unique ID for the requesting feature to track the response.

actions.summary: Clears any active confirmation dialog from the UI. Dispatches a private response if it was a confirmation.
Broadcasts the complete state of user identities after any change.

identities.description: The full list of Identity objects.

actions.summary: [INTERNAL] Dispatched after user identities have been loaded from disk.
The private response envelope sent to the original feature that requested a confirmation dialog.

Register a new identity in the universal registry. If localHandle is omitted, CoreFeature generates one from the name via slugification. If a UUID is provided and valid, it is used instead of auto-generating one (useful for correlation). The originator automatically becomes the parent. CoreFeature validates localHandle format if provided, deduplicates among siblings, and returns the approved identity via a targeted RETURN_REGISTER_IDENTITY.

localHandle.description: Optional leaf-level handle. If provided, must match [a-z][a-z0-9-]*. If omitted, generated from name.

name.description: Human-readable display name (full Unicode allowed). Required.

uuid.description: Optional caller-provided UUID. Must be valid UUID format (8-4-4-4-12 hex). If omitted, auto-generated.

actions.summary: Targeted response to a core.REGISTER_IDENTITY request. Contains the approved identity on success, or an error on failure. The caller can correlate by UUID (if one was provided in the request) or by requestedLocalHandle.

requestedLocalHandle.description: The localHandle that was originally requested.

approvedLocalHandle.description: The localHandle that was actually registered (may differ due to deduplication). Only present on success.

handle.description: The full bus address of the registered identity. Only present on success.

uuid.description: The UUID of the registered identity. Matches caller-provided UUID if one was given. Only present on success.

name.description: The display name. Only present on success.

parentHandle.description: The parent's full handle (= the originator). Only present on success.

error.description: Error message explaining why registration was rejected. Only present on failure.

actions.summary: Remove an identity from the registry. Cascades: all descendants (by handle prefix) are also removed. Namespace enforcement: the originator can only unregister identities within its own namespace. Only delivered to CoreFeature (non-broadcast); a core.IDENTITY_REGISTRY_UPDATED event follows on success.

handle.description: Full handle of the identity to remove.

actions.summary: Broadcast after any change to the identity registry. Features that need to react to identity changes (e.g., updating UI, refreshing name caches) should listen for this. Replaces both core.IDENTITIES_UPDATED and agent.AGENT_NAMES_UPDATED for registry consumers.

Update the name (and consequently the handle/slug) of an existing identity. The UUID and parent are preserved. Namespace enforcement: the originator can only update identities within its own namespace. Cascading: children's parentHandle and handle are updated. A targeted RETURN_UPDATE_IDENTITY is sent to the caller.

handle.description: Full handle of the identity to update.

newName.description: The new display name. A new localHandle/slug will be derived from this.

actions.summary: Targeted response to a core.UPDATE_IDENTITY request. Sent to the original caller with the updated identity details, and also sent as cascading notifications to features owning child identities whose handles changed.

newHandle.description: The handle after the update. Only present on success.

name.description: The new display name. Only present on success.

uuid.description: The UUID (unchanged). Only present on success.

actions.summary: [INTERNAL] Records a correlationId → session mapping when CoreFeature dispatches a domain action on behalf of a user command. Used to route targeted RETURN_* data back to the session via commandbot.DELIVER_TO_SESSION.
[INTERNAL] Removes a pending command entry after the result has been forwarded to the session, or on TTL expiry.
